mapper.select: SELECT MAX(seq) FROM ( SELECT CAST(RIGHT(dormitory_id, 4) AS INTEGER) AS seq FROM dormitory WHERE LENGTH(dormitory_id) >= 13 AND SUBSTRING(dormitory_id FROM LENGTH(dormitory_id) - 11 FOR 8) = #{datePart} AND RIGHT(dormitory_id, 4) ~ '^[0-9]{4}$' UNION ALL SELECT CAST(RIGHT(room_id, 4) AS INTEGER) FROM room WHERE LENGTH(room_id) >= 13 AND SUBSTRING(room_id FROM LENGTH(room_id) - 11 FOR 8) = #{datePart} AND RIGHT(room_id, 4) ~ '^[0-9]{4}$' UNION ALL SELECT CAST(RIGHT(residence_history_id, 4) AS INTEGER) FROM residence_history WHERE LENGTH(residence_history_id) >= 13 AND SUBSTRING(residence_history_id FROM LENGTH(residence_history_id) - 11 FOR 8) = #{datePart} AND RIGHT(residence_history_id, 4) ~ '^[0-9]{4}$' UNION ALL SELECT CAST(RIGHT(affiliation_id, 4) AS INTEGER) FROM affiliation WHERE LENGTH(affiliation_id) >= 13 AND SUBSTRING(affiliation_id FROM LENGTH(affiliation_id) - 11 FOR 8) = #{datePart} AND RIGHT(affiliation_id, 4) ~ '^[0-9]{4}$' UNION ALL SELECT CAST(RIGHT(dorm_fee_id, 4) AS INTEGER) FROM dorm_fee WHERE LENGTH(dorm_fee_id) >= 13 AND SUBSTRING(dorm_fee_id FROM LENGTH(dorm_fee_id) - 11 FOR 8) = #{datePart} AND RIGHT(dorm_fee_id, 4) ~ '^[0-9]{4}$' UNION ALL SELECT CAST(RIGHT(job_id, 4) AS INTEGER) FROM excel_import_job WHERE LENGTH(job_id) >= 13 AND SUBSTRING(job_id FROM LENGTH(job_id) - 11 FOR 8) = #{datePart} AND RIGHT(job_id, 4) ~ '^[0-9]{4}$' UNION ALL SELECT CAST(RIGHT(equipment_id, 4) AS INTEGER) FROM equipment WHERE LENGTH(equipment_id) >= 13 AND SUBSTRING(equipment_id FROM LENGTH(equipment_id) - 11 FOR 8) = #{datePart} AND RIGHT(equipment_id, 4) ~ '^[0-9]{4}$' UNION ALL SELECT CAST(RIGHT(moveout_id, 4) AS INTEGER) FROM equipment_moveout WHERE LENGTH(moveout_id) >= 13 AND SUBSTRING(moveout_id FROM LENGTH(moveout_id) - 11 FOR 8) = #{datePart} AND RIGHT(moveout_id, 4) ~ '^[0-9]{4}$' UNION ALL SELECT CAST(RIGHT(storage_id, 4) AS INTEGER) FROM equipment_storage WHERE LENGTH(storage_id) >= 13 AND SUBSTRING(storage_id FROM LENGTH(storage_id) - 11 FOR 8) = #{datePart} AND RIGHT(storage_id, 4) ~ '^[0-9]{4}$' UNION ALL SELECT CAST(SUBSTRING(equipment_asset_id FROM 11 FOR 4) AS INTEGER) FROM equipment_asset WHERE LENGTH(equipment_asset_id) = 14 AND equipment_asset_id LIKE 'EB%' AND SUBSTRING(equipment_asset_id FROM 3 FOR 8) = #{datePart} AND SUBSTRING(equipment_asset_id FROM 11 FOR 4) ~ '^[0-9]{4}$' UNION ALL SELECT CAST(SUBSTRING(usage_id FROM 11 FOR 4) AS INTEGER) FROM equipment_usage WHERE LENGTH(usage_id) = 14 AND usage_id LIKE 'EU%' AND SUBSTRING(usage_id FROM 3 FOR 8) = #{datePart} AND SUBSTRING(usage_id FROM 11 FOR 4) ~ '^[0-9]{4}$' UNION ALL SELECT CAST(SUBSTRING(storage_location_id FROM 11 FOR 4) AS INTEGER) FROM storage_location WHERE LENGTH(storage_location_id) = 14 AND storage_location_id LIKE 'SL%' AND SUBSTRING(storage_location_id FROM 3 FOR 8) = #{datePart} AND SUBSTRING(storage_location_id FROM 11 FOR 4) ~ '^[0-9]{4}$' ) sequences
